subject: [COMMON] Add pre upgrade script to dgbuilder
commit_message:
[COMMON] Add pre upgrade script to dgbuilder

As dgbuilder is deployed in SDNC and CCSDK as a subcomponent, it is
required to support the rolling upgrade of dgbuilder to enable the
rolling upgrade of major components.

Issue-ID: OOM-2378
Change-Id: Ie66682a54ed3267102fe166f68df94a0ef5c30a9
Signed-off-by: tringuyen <tri.nguyen@tatacommunications.com>

entries.message:
